Rebecca Saroyan, Esq. of Jackson Wallace, 415-982-6300 for defendant and moving party Warren Pumps, Inc.
Keith Shaw, Esq. of of Brayton & Purcell, 415-898-1555 for plaintiff and opposing party Herbert Marines

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT WARREN PUMPS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO MATERIAL ISSUE OF TRIABLE FACT. ANY CONCEIVABLE LINK BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT ON A SHIP AND PLAINTIFF'S PRESENCE YEARS LATER IS TOO SPECULATIVE TO DEFEAT SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189. (301/BUSCH/BL)

Defendant Warren Pumps Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rebecca Saroyan, Esq. of Jackson Wallace, 415-982-6300 for defendant and moving party Warren Pumps, Inc.
Keith Shaw, Esq. of of Brayton & Purcell, 415-898-1555 for plaintiff and opposing party Herbert Marines
